---
title: "Pitcher 2 - Pitching Report"
output:
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: xelatex
    keep_tex: false
    includes:
      in_header: pitcher2_header.tex
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
params:
  excel_path: "/Users/akhichappidi/PDP/2025 PDP Data Exercise.xlsx"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.retina = 1,
  out.width = "100%",
  fig.align = "center"
)

library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
library(patchwork)
library(gt)
library(scales)
library(janitor)

source("../R/utils.R")

excel_path <- params$excel_path

trackman_raw <- readxl::read_excel(excel_path, sheet = "Trackman Data") %>%
  janitor::remove_empty("cols")

pitcher_name <- "Pitcher 2"

pitcher_df <- trackman_raw %>%
  filter(Pitcher == pitcher_name)

if (nrow(pitcher_df) == 0) {
  stop("No Trackman rows found for Pitcher 2.")
}

pitcher_df <- pitcher_df %>%
  mutate(
    pitch_type = case_when(
      !is.na(TaggedPitchType) & TaggedPitchType != "" ~ TaggedPitchType,
      !is.na(AutoPitchType) & AutoPitchType != "" ~ AutoPitchType,
      TRUE ~ "Unknown"
    )
  )

total_pitches <- nrow(pitcher_df)

valid_calls <- unique(stats::na.omit(trackman_raw$PitchCall))

strike_calls_full <- c(
  "StrikeCalled",
  "StrikeSwinging",
  "FoulBall",
  "FoulBallNotFieldable",
  "FoulBallFieldable",
  "InPlay"
)
swings_calls_full <- c(
  "StrikeSwinging",
  "FoulBall",
  "FoulBallNotFieldable",
  "FoulBallFieldable",
  "InPlay"
)

strike_calls <- intersect(strike_calls_full, valid_calls)
swings_calls <- intersect(swings_calls_full, valid_calls)

if (length(strike_calls) == 0) {
  strike_calls <- c("StrikeCalled", "StrikeSwinging", "FoulBallNotFieldable", "InPlay")
}
if (length(swings_calls) == 0) {
  swings_calls <- c("StrikeSwinging", "FoulBallNotFieldable", "InPlay")
}

strike_pitches <- sum(pitcher_df$PitchCall %in% strike_calls, na.rm = TRUE)
swings <- sum(pitcher_df$PitchCall %in% swings_calls, na.rm = TRUE)
whiffs <- sum(pitcher_df$PitchCall == "StrikeSwinging", na.rm = TRUE)

strike_pct <- ifelse(total_pitches > 0, strike_pitches / total_pitches, NA_real_)
swing_pct <- ifelse(total_pitches > 0, swings / total_pitches, NA_real_)
whiff_pct <- ifelse(swings > 0, whiffs / swings, NA_real_)

pitch_mix_df <- pitcher_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(pitch_type), pitch_type != "") %>%
  count(pitch_type, name = "n") %>%
  mutate(
    pct = n / sum(n),
    pitch_type = stats::reorder(pitch_type, pct)
  )

velo_spin_by_type <- pitcher_df %>%
  group_by(pitch_type) %>%
  summarise(
    pitches = n(),
    avg_velo = mean(RelSpeed, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_velo = max(RelSpeed, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_spin = mean(SpinRate, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

overall_summary_tbl <- tibble::tibble(
  Metric = c(
    "Total pitches",
    "Strike%",
    "Swing%",
    "Whiff%"
  ),
  Value = c(
    as.character(total_pitches),
    scales::percent(strike_pct, accuracy = 0.1),
    scales::percent(swing_pct, accuracy = 0.1),
    ifelse(is.na(whiff_pct), "N/A", scales::percent(whiff_pct, accuracy = 0.1))
  )
)

velo_spin_gt <- velo_spin_by_type %>%
  mutate(
    `Pitch Mix %` = if (!is.null(pitch_mix_df) && nrow(pitch_mix_df) > 0) {
      pct_match <- pitch_mix_df %>%
        as.data.frame() %>%
        select(pitch_type, pct)
      mix_joined <- left_join(., pct_match, by = "pitch_type")
      scales::percent(mix_joined$pct, accuracy = 0.1)
    } else {
      NA_character_
    },
    `Avg Velo` = round(avg_velo, 1),
    `Max Velo` = round(max_velo, 1),
    `Avg Spin` = round(avg_spin, 0)
  ) %>%
  select(
    `Pitch Type` = pitch_type,
    `Pitch Mix %`,
    `Pitches` = pitches,
    `Avg Velo`,
    `Max Velo`,
    `Avg Spin`
  )

dir.create("../outputs/tmp", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

gt1 <- overall_summary_tbl %>%
  gt() %>%
  cols_label(Metric = "Metric", Value = "Value") %>%
  tab_header(title = "Summary") %>%
  tab_options(table.font.size = px(10), data_row.padding = px(3), heading.padding = px(3))

gt2 <- velo_spin_gt %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Pitch Type (Velo, Spin)") %>%
  tab_options(table.font.size = px(10), data_row.padding = px(3), heading.padding = px(3))

try({
  gt::gtsave(gt1, "../outputs/tmp/pitcher_tbl1.png")
  gt::gtsave(gt2, "../outputs/tmp/pitcher_tbl2.png")
}, silent = TRUE)

# Plots
pitch_mix_plot <- ggplot(pitch_mix_df, aes(x = pitch_type, y = pct)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#2c7fb8") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Pitch Mix", x = "Pitch Type", y = "Usage %") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 9) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

velo_plot <- ggplot(pitcher_df, aes(x = pitch_type, y = RelSpeed, fill = pitch_type)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha = 0.4) +
  labs(title = "Velocity", x = "Pitch Type", y = "Velocity (mph)") +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 9) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

movement_plot <- ggplot(pitcher_df, aes(x = HorzBreak, y = InducedVertBreak, color = pitch_type)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey70") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey70") +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 1.5) +
  coord_equal() +
  labs(title = "Movement (IVB vs HB)", x = "Horizontal Break (in)", y = "Induced Vertical Break (in)", color = "Pitch Type") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 9) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.direction = "horizontal", legend.key.size = unit(0.4, "cm"))

pitcher_df <- pitcher_df %>%
  mutate(
    PlateLocSide = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(PlateLocSide)),
    PlateLocHeight = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(PlateLocHeight))
  )
location_df <- pitcher_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(PlateLocSide), !is.na(PlateLocHeight))

location_plot <- if (nrow(location_df) == 0) {
  ggplot() + theme_void() + labs(title = "Pitch Location (No data)")
} else {
  xmin_zone <- -0.83
  xmax_zone <- 0.83
  ymin_zone <- 1.5
  ymax_zone <- 3.5
  base_p <- ggplot(location_df, aes(x = PlateLocSide, y = PlateLocHeight, color = pitch_type)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 1.2)
  base_p <- add_strikezone_9box(base_p, xmin = xmin_zone, xmax = xmax_zone, ymin = ymin_zone, ymax = ymax_zone)
  base_p +
    coord_equal(xlim = c(-1.5, 1.5), ylim = c(0, 5)) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(-1.5, 1.5, 0.5), labels = scales::number_format(accuracy = 0.1)) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = 0:5, labels = scales::number_format(accuracy = 0.1)) +
    labs(title = "Pitch Location", subtitle = paste0("n = ", nrow(location_df)), x = "PlateLocSide (in)", y = "PlateLocHeight (in)", color = "Pitch Type") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 9) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.direction = "horizontal", legend.key.size = unit(0.4, "cm"))
}

plots_combined <- (pitch_mix_plot | velo_plot) / (movement_plot | location_plot)

if (knitr::is_html_output()) {
  try(ggplot2::ggsave("../outputs/tmp/pitcher_plots.png", plot = plots_combined, width = 10, height = 5.5, dpi = 150), silent = TRUE)
}
```

### Summary (Pitcher 2)

```{r tables-top, out.width=c("49%","49%"), fig.show="hold"}
if (file.exists("../outputs/tmp/pitcher_tbl1.png") && file.exists("../outputs/tmp/pitcher_tbl2.png")) {
  knitr::include_graphics(c("../outputs/tmp/pitcher_tbl1.png", "../outputs/tmp/pitcher_tbl2.png"))
} else {
  gt1
  gt2
}
```

### Visuals

```{r visuals, fig.width=10, fig.height=5, out.width="100%"}
plots_combined
```
